reviews.comment:
Muy bien la estacion. Playeros bien organizados con una sola fila q distribuyen x surtidor.
Se puede pagar con debito y con QR de aplicacion se ypf y de mercado pago.

(Translated by Google)
The resort is very good. The beach service is well-organized, with a single line distributed by pump.
You can pay with debit and QR codes from the YPF app and Mercado Pago.

reviews.comment:
Luego de cargar nafta el auto comenzó a fallar, lo llevé a dos mecánicos de la zona y coincidieron en que ese ACA vende nafta adulterada. Luego de tener que cambiar toda la nafta mas limpieza y perdida de tiempo y dinero se solucionó el problema. NO LO RECOMIENDO

(Translated by Google)
After filling up with gas, the car started malfunctioning. I took it to two local mechanics, and they both agreed that this ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) sells adulterated gasoline. After having to change all the gasoline, plus cleaning and wasting time and money, the problem was finally solved. I DO NOT RECOMMEND IT.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2eVAtZzZBRRAB
